subcodes.first_line: O saplings of the divine garden! Ye have sprung from that Tree of mystic knowledge and in the garden of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهالان بوستان الهی شما از آن شجره عرفان روایدید و در بوستان هدایت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @education of children; moral education, @bringing forth results; fruit, @being a source of light; guidance
